rationale: Educ. Code §30.053 governs appointment, qualifications, salary, and duties of the superintendent of the Texas School for the Deaf. It contains no provision related to property tax, homestead exemptions, or appraised value, so the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change does not conflict.
quote: The superintendent of the Texas School for the Deaf is appointed by the governing board of the school.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to homestead exemptions or property tax; no conflict identified.
